message:
chore: add .DS_Store to .gitignore

Ignore macOS Finder metadata files that should not be tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,9 @@
 .ci-cache/
 .ci-output/
 
+# macOS metadata
+.DS_Store
+
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
 node_modules/
